subject: Re: Issues with GPU's in Warp
body:
Hi Chris,

does it matter which GPU you deselect? How much CPU RAM does that machine 
have? Related to the slow speed: what's the network connection like and 
what format do you use for the data?

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Tuesday, September 15, 2020 at 8:11:18 PM UTC+2 C Arthur wrote:

> Hi all, I am running Warp 1.0.9 with two GPU's
> - GeForce GTX 1080 Ti
> - GeForce RTX 2080 Ti
>
> Our data is being stored in a different location and we make symlinks to 
> it locally on the Warp PC.
> When I start Warp, I select both GPU's (upper right), and in the Global 
> settings I have 1 processor: <Param Name="ProcessesPerDevice" Value="1" />
> Within 30 seconds Warp Worker crashes.
> If I select just one GPU then it will run, but very slowly (~80 movies/hr)
> If I load in about 500 movies locally, select both GPU's and set Processor 
> to 1, it will run at about 200movies/hr, but if I switch to 2 processors, 
> Warp worker crashes.
> Any pointers on troubleshooting this? I am also trying to find any sort of 
> a log file that is generated.
> Thanks!
> -Chris
>
